name: finish-line
tagline: Resolves blocked React Router community PRs (unsigned CLA, missing change file or docs) by pushing maintainer fixes or recreating the PR.
verdict: Well-structured decision workflow with explicit triage paths, failure handling, and a defined final report. Notable oddity: the replacement-branch name hardcodes one maintainer's username despite generic 'maintainer' framing. gh usage is undeclared and there is no versioning signal or re-run guard.

highlights.summary: Branch name hardcodes one person: 'git checkout -B brophdawg11/finish-line-pr-<pr-number> origin/main' despite generic 'maintainer' language elsewhere.
No check for whether a given PR was already processed by a prior finish-line run (e.g., a replacement PR already open).
gh CLI used throughout with no upfront install/auth declaration or check.
